title: rubus idaeus
intro: Rubus idaeus, also known as the wild raspberry or red raspberry, is a perennial plant that belongs to the rose family. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves, stems, and roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus idaeus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Rubus idaeus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support menstrual health, boost the immune system, and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
